title: UX Widget Interface Version
text: UX Widget Interface Version With UX Widget Interface Version, each UX widget receives an additional setting: uxInterfaceVersion in the physical widget definition section of the web.ini file. This setting specifies the version of the UX interface used to implement the widget. To create a custom widget using Interface Version 2, add the uxInterfaceVersion=2 setting to the physical widget definition section of the web.ini file. For more information, see [PhysicalWidgetName] and web.ini . Related Links UX Widget Interface Version 2 UX Widget Interface Version 2 introduces a new format for the data argument in the UX Widget Interface API functions: processLayout(), onConnect(), dataUpdate(), and dataCleanup(). This update simplifies the implementation of complex widgets with sub-widgets. Migration to Interface Version 2 To work with Interface Version 2, each UX widget or your custom widget must include the uxInterfaceVersion = 2 setting in the physical widget definition section of the web.ini file. Developers must ensure this setting is added when implementing a custom widget with Interface Version 2. Compatibility Utility The Compatibility Utility enables you to make your custom widget, implemented using a previous UX Interface version, compatible with a newer UX Interface version. It is provided as a set of JavaScript modules located by default in the following directory: uniface/webapps/ux_compatibility_utils/ Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
